auth.idle_timeout_locked: Session locked for security because of inactivity.
validation.min_length: {label} must be at least {min} characters long.
audit.no_events_current_filter: No audit events for the current filter.
updates.active_up_to_date: Automatic Beagle updates are active. This server is already up to date.
updates.active_update_pending: A new Beagle update is available or being prepared.
updates.active_needs_attention: The automatic GitHub check needs attention. Details are below in the status.
updates.active_in_progress: The server is currently processing a Beagle update from GitHub.
updates.disabled: Automatic Beagle updates are disabled. Updates must be triggered manually.
updates.apt_manual_hint: APT updates remain intentionally manual. Automation only applies to the GitHub repo update path.
downloads.all_present: All required downloads and installation files are present.
downloads.checking: The server is checking whether all required downloads and installation files are present.
downloads.watchdog_active_repair: Automatic download repair is active. Missing or outdated files will be fixed automatically.
downloads.watchdog_active_no_repair: Download monitoring is active, but auto-repair is disabled.
downloads.missing_files: {count} required file(s) are missing. Use "Rebuild/refresh artifacts" to recreate them.
downloads.release_ready: Installimage/public release is ready: latest and versioned thin-client artifacts are present.
os_updates.up_to_date: The server is up to date. No OS updates are currently needed.
os_updates.single: 1 OS update is available. Installation requires a manual click.
os_updates.multiple: {count} OS updates are available. Installation requires a manual click.
jobs.workflow_live: The workflow is running in the foreground with live steps.
vm.no_gpu_passthrough: No live passthrough GPU class detected. See /#panel=virtualization for details.
error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
error.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
error.server: Server error ({status}). Please try again later.
empty.no_vms: No VMs yet — Create your first VM
empty.no_pools: No pools yet — Create your first pool
vm.connect_first: No data. Connect with your API token first.
virt.inspector.login_required: Please log in to load VM details.
